name: In the Desert
description:
The speck on the horizon grows larger as you plod south through the mountains
of sand. The sun continues to burn your skin, and your tounge has dried like
a mound of baked clay in your mouth. A small pool of water appears far to the 
west.

exits.description: The desert continues to the north.
The desert continues to the south.
A shimmering pool lies to the west.
